description.value:
Cold-cut geometry from far-north hunters — Hvitvidde hunters must kill cleanly or lose prey in the ice; their blade-geometry is calculated to sever rather than wound, and the cold that is worked into the temper ensures nothing — not magic, not supernatural toughness — can blunt the killing edge.

Effect: Once per encounter, one strike you make with this weapon ignores damage immunity 5 on the target.

Rules: Damage Immunity; Strike; Encounter.

project.prerequisites: A weapon of exceptional quality; glacier-water quenching from Hvitvidde and bone-geometry notes from a far-north master
